title: Does Santa Have a Great Job? Gift Shopping Value and Satisfaction
citation: Babin, B. J., Gonzalez, C., & Watts, C. (2007). Does Santa Have a Great Job? Gift Shopping Value and Satisfaction. Psychology & Marketing, 24(10), 895-917.
notes: Used to support gift_buyer_uncertain as a gift-shopping-specific intent prior; store compact paraphrases only.

title: Hedonic Shopping Motivations
citation: Arnold, M. J., & Reynolds, K. E. (2003). Hedonic Shopping Motivations. Journal of Retailing, 79(2), 77-95. https://doi.org/10.1016/S0022-4359(03)00007-1
notes: Used as a more accessible support for hedonic/recreational browsing than the Bellenger secondary citation alone.
